---
name: New Platform Request
about: Request a sample script for a platform not yet covered
title: '[New Platform] '
labels: new-platform
assignees: ''
---

## Target System
What system, application, or device needs a custom platform?

## Protocol
SSH, HTTP/REST, Telnet, or something else?

## Operations Needed
Which operations are required? For example: CheckPassword, ChangePassword, or DiscoverAccounts.

## Authentication Method
How does the target authenticate? For example: password, API key, certificate, or another method.

## Documentation
Share links to the target system's admin or API documentation.

## SPP Version
What is the minimum SPP version available?

## Additional Context
List any special requirements, known challenges, or environment details.
